name: Gujarat Sidhee Cement Limited
summary: Gujarat Sidhee Cement Limited manufactures and sells cement and clinker in India. It offers ordinary Portland cement and Portland pozzolana cement under the Sidhee brand name. The company also exports its products. Gujarat Sidhee Cement Limited was incorporated in 1973 and is based in Mumbai, India. Gujarat Sidhee Cement Limited is a subsidiary of Bhadra Textiles and Trading Private Limited.
